brand_dna.category: Comfort-first, sustainability-led footwear and apparel built from natural materials.
brand_dna.core_belief: Better things, made in a better way. Comfort, design, and doing right by the planet are not a trade-off.
proof_points: Eucalyptus tree fiber, merino wool and sugarcane SweetFoam soles
Carbon footprint printed on every product
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, understated, material-first. Design over logos and hype.

voice_pillars.name: Warm & plainspoken
voice_pillars.desc: Conversational, zero jargon. You explain, you don't lecture.
voice_pillars.quote: Meet the shoe that started it all.

voice_pillars.name: Quietly confident
voice_pillars.desc: You let the materials do the talking instead of shouting superlatives.

voice_pillars.name: Purpose-forward, never preachy
voice_pillars.desc: Sustainability is stated as fact, not guilt.
voice_pillars.quote: The carbon footprint of this product is on the label.

phrases: Wore them straight out of the box.

icp: 28-45, values-driven professional with minimalist taste, willing to pay a premium for comfort and lower impact, buys quality over quantity.

personas.name: The Conscious Minimalist
personas.description: Wants fewer, better things. Sustainability is the tiebreaker, comfort and design are the driver.

personas.name: The Comfort-First Commuter
personas.description: On their feet all day. Prioritizes all-day comfort and easy care, responds to the 'wear them everywhere' angle.

allowed.claim: Made with natural materials: eucalyptus tree fiber, merino wool, sugarcane
Carbon footprint labeled on every product

banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unsubstantiated sustainability claim
Needs verified offset backing to state flatly
Too vague to defend per FTC

banned.claim: The most comfortable shoe in the world
